data.title: Cisco's AI Expansion and Cloud Growth Drive Analyst Upgrades And Price Hikes, Citing Growth Like Extreme & Juniper
data.description: Cisco beats earnings estimates, reports strong revenue and raises guidance, leading to positive ratings and price target increases from analysts.

data.title: Robert F. Kennedy's Confirmation: Cannabis Advocates Question His New Vow To 'Follow The Science' On Marijuana's Harms
data.description: Kennedy once said marijuana was a way to help "solve America's drug addiction problem." Now he's "follow the science" on the harms.

data.title: Leqembi And Skyclarys Expected To Drive Biogen's Future Growth: Analysts
data.description: Biogen's Q4 EPS and revenue topped estimates, but analysts cite Medicare changes and MS declines as headwinds. Leqembi and Skyclarys remain key growth drivers.

data.title: Burger King Parent Restaurant Brands Shows Signs Of Improvement Despite Pressures, Analysts Remain Bullish
data.description: Oppenheimer analyst Brian Bittner maintains an Outperform rating on Restaurant Brands with a $77 price target. Analyst projects a 2.5% same-store sales growth for 2025, slightly under the company's target, with unit growth forecasted at 3.6%.

data.title: Demystifying Antero Resources: Insights From 12 Analyst Reviews
